special_mechanics.name: Dash Attack
special_mechanics.description: Japanese version: double-tap left or right to dash; hitting attack while dashing performs a slide attack. International version: Predator always moves at dashing speed; L/R buttons trigger slide left/right.

physics_values.regional_variant: Japanese uses half-speed walk + dash mechanic; International uses constant dash speed

special_mechanics.name: Shoulder Laser
special_mechanics.description: Special weapon attack. Greatly weakened in international release and no longer drains player health per shot.

special_mechanics.name: Full Laser Strike
special_mechanics.description: Powerful special attack consuming special bar.

special_mechanics.name: Special Attack Bar
special_mechanics.description: Charges to enable special attacks. Bar length differs by region.

feel_descriptors: weighty (based on damage reduction in international version)
tier_notes: Tier 2 qualitative data. Movement physics not precisely documented; only regional gameplay balance changes provided. No sub-pixel system data available. Special attack costs and UI metrics documented but player locomotion physics (gravity, acceleration, jump height) not specified.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Alien vs. Predator (SNES)
